events.title: World Cup Eve with Kaduregel Shefel @ Adidas, TLV Mall
events.details:
https://www.secrettelaviv.com/tickets/world-cup-eve-with-kaduregel-shefel-adidas-tlv-mall

Get ready for World Cup Eve with Kaduregel Shefel at Adidas! Join the community at TLV Mall on June 16 for insightful talks, free beer, tasty bites, cool stickers, and exclusive Adidas deals. Don’t miss out!
